TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Ludja, title = Ludja, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ludja} }

S.FORM: Ludja Itiniay i Taiwu Cen no Pingtung ko Ludja a niyaro', 42 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 184 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 95% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 175 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 5% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 9 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan 93%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%.
S.PHON: …ĺo~u~u…¨~…ģja itiniaj i taiwo~u~u ¶…ôn no~u piŇčto~u~uŇč ko~u …ĺo~u~u…¨~…ģja a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, * ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u paiwan **%, amis *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%.
S.FORM: Ludja Itiniay i Taiwu Cen no Pingtung ko Ludja a niyaro', 42 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 184 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 95% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 175 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 5% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 9 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan 93%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%.
